Until a maintainer pastes a real recorded session, the transcript_excerpt and outcome below are illustrative placeholders, not the output of a live model run.
codex_command: ./scripts/install-codex.sh --skill init-ai-repo && codex "scaffold the v3 AI-SDLC tree in this scratch repo using the init-ai-repo skill"
scenario: Ask Codex, with init-ai-repo installed, to scaffold the v3 AI-SDLC tree (.ai/, .memory/, docs/architecture/adr/, AGENTS.md + thin CLAUDE.md/GEMINI.md pointers) in an empty scratch repository.
outcome: placeholder — not yet recorded (see disclaimer). Expected on a real run: Codex discovers init-ai-repo, reads AGENTS.md as the single source of truth, and emits the v3 tree with thin CLAUDE.md/GEMINI.md pointers and no Claude-only invocation on the core path.
